name: kagi
description: Redirect web search and page fetches to the Kagi CLI, which searches signed in as you and returns structured results instead of a summary.

websearch.title: Redirect WebSearch
websearch.description: Deny WebSearch and point at kagi search, which applies your rankings, lenses, and bangs.

webfetch.title: Redirect WebFetch
webfetch.description: Deny WebFetch and point at kagi ask-page, extract, or summarize. GitHub URLs are left to the github plugin.

bash.title: Redirect curl of search engines
bash.description: Deny curl or wget of a search engine result page, or of kagi.com itself, and point at the kagi CLI.

context.title: Load the command guide at session start
context.description: Name the kagi command per need at session start, and point at kagi skills get kagi for the rest.
